# Electricity

Electricity sub-package manages classes relevent to managing data on electricity used in both material production and building operations. [`ElectricityProducer`](electricity_producer.md#pod_lca.electricity.ElectricityProducer) class manages the electricity generation aspects including [`Impacts`](impact_records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Impacts) and [`Emissions`](impact_records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Emissions). [`ElectricitySupply`](electricity_supply.md#pod_lca.electricity.ElectricitySupply) manages the  electricity usage aspects including mix of electricity generation technologies.
